## Summary

- what changed
- why it changed

## Validation

- [ ] `npm run typecheck`
- [ ] `npm run test`
- [ ] `npm run test:e2e`
- [ ] `npm run test:sitl` when runtime/write-path behavior changed
- [ ] live-FC validation when hardware-facing behavior changed

## Safety / Capability Review

- [ ] no existing capability was removed accidentally
- [ ] advanced/expert paths remain reachable when relevant
- [ ] risky live actions remain guarded
- [ ] docs were updated if contributor-facing behavior changed

## Notes

Add any screenshots, live-hardware notes, or known follow-ups here.
